# wasAttributeConsumed(_:)

**Instance Method**

A method that indicates whether the file system used the given attribute.

## Declaration

```swift
func wasAttributeConsumed(_ attribute: FSItem.Attribute) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **attribute**: The [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSItem/Attribute] to check.

## Inspecting used attributes

- **consumedAttributes**: The attributes successfully used by the file system.
- **FSItem.Attribute**: A value that indicates a set of item attributes to get or set.
